properties.script: Once a busy mining and trading town Tohnvilh is now a shell of what it once was since the mine closed down, few stuck around, and fewer still will talk to outsiders.
Deadly monsters have taken control of the once properous lowlands, it's a dangerous place.

CAUTION: Mine closed until further notice, site is very dangerous

ABSOLUTELY NO ENTRY

CAUTION: Mine closed until further notice, site is very dangerous

ABSOLUTELY NO ENTRY
